GenAiFunction.description:
Query STRUCTURED data in Data Cloud entities (DMO, DLO, CIO) using SQL (not SOQL). Supports SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, LIMIT, JOIN, and aggregates (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX).
Use when: - Aggregations or counts over Data Cloud entities: "How many accounts per industry?", "Top 10 opportunities by amount", "Average order value last quarter". - Semantic / hybrid search over indexed content: use hybrid_search() and JOIN to the chunk table (example below). - The entity name ends in __dlm, __dll, or __cio.
NOT for: - Standard/Custom SObjects in the org (Account, Opportunity, __c) — use QueryRecordsWithSoql with SOQL. - Unstructured document Q&A ("what does the refund policy say?", "find the termination clause") — use SearchDataLibrary. - Creating/updating records — Data Cloud via this action is read-only SQL.
Preconditions: - MUST call ExploreDataCloud (scope=details or summary) FIRST to confirm entity and field names. Never guess Data Cloud names. - On "entity not found" or "column unknown": silently retry up to twice after calling ExploreDataCloud to discover correct names.
Semantic search pattern: SELECT c.Chunk__c, h.hybrid_score__c FROM hybrid_search(TABLE(Name_index__dlm), 'query', '', 10) AS h JOIN Name_chunk__dlm AS c ON h.SourceRecordId__c = c.RecordId__c ORDER BY h.hybrid_score__c DESC Use ExploreDataCloud to find the matching _index__dlm and _chunk__dlm pair first.
Output: - Returns JSON array on success, JSON error object on failure — raw JSON is NOT shown to the user. - Parse and format: tables, lists, or summaries; compress large result sets; include record links where possible; for aggregates, explain what the numbers represent. Translate errors into user-friendly language.
